game_info.title: Stone Story 3D
game_info.concept:
In a realm of perpetual darkness, a single stone could change everything.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/stone-story-rpg/id1076120218

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

In a realm of perpetual darkness, a single stone could change everything.

--Game Features--

[Conquer a vast world, filled with monsters, mysteries, and treasure!]

> The Dark World holds many secrets, waiting to be discovered! Embark on your heroic journey to unite 9 magic Soul Stones and restore the light. 

[Master deceptively simple combat to overwhelm your enemies]

> Stone Story RPG is a game that’s easy to learn but hard to master. A robust A.I. does all the exploring, combat and looting, leaving you to focus on strategy!

[Endless hours of wonder await you, Stonehead!]

> Your adventure is just beginning! Play through everything Stone Story RPG has to offer: sidequests, minigames, challenge events, and more!

[Create your ASCII armory]
> Discover countless unique weapons through Stone Story RPG’s engaging crafting system. Mix and match weapons to unlock new, even stronger weapons!

[Defeat increasingly difficult enemies as you progress through the game]

> An adventurer is only as good as their tools. Collect a variety of unique weapons and upgrade them to unimaginable heights! The power of the gods is in your hands.

[Get lost in a beautifully crafted ASCII world]

> Every piece of ASCII animation in Stone Story RPG is typed up character by character. Hundreds of frames of animation bring 8 different detailed locations to life.

[Unlock your true potential with Stonescript]

> For the most hardcore adventurers, Stonescript gives you a blank canvas to create your masterpiece. Craft custom cosmetics, make your own minigames, and achieve superhuman heights by fine-tuning the AI!

Terms of service: https://stonestoryrpg.com/tos.html
game_info.description: Journey through the Dark World as a lone adventurer. In this stylized 3D reimagining of Stone Story RPG, you must navigate a perilous realm of perpetual darkness. Armed with your trusty weapons, battle blocky monsters, leap over voids, and collect the legendary Soul Stones to restore light to the world. The combat is semi-automatic—your hero attacks when enemies are near—but your positioning and timing are key to survival.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys / WASD: Move left/right and jump
- Space: Dash (if unlocked) / Jump
- Z: Swap Weapon (Sword/Hammer)
- Shift: Sprint
- ENTER: Start Game
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and gravity physics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate Right Arrow key press for 1 second, then Space bar for 0.2 seconds. Monitor player position coordinates.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player X coordinate should increase. Player Y coordinate should increase during jump and decrease afterwards, settling back on ground level.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement and gravity physics.

TEST_1.expected: Player X coordinate should increase. Player Y coordinate should increase during jump and decrease afterwards, settling back on ground level.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify combat system and enemy interaction.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Spawn an enemy directly in front of the player. Move player towards enemy until within attack range. Wait for auto-attack timer.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Enemy health should decrease. If enemy health reaches 0, enemy should be removed from the entities array and score should increase.

TEST_2.expected: Enemy health should decrease. If enemy health reaches 0, enemy should be removed from the entities array and score should increase.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Record current weapon type. Simulate 'Z' key press. Check player's weapon property.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player active weapon should change from 'sword' to 'hammer' (or vice versa) and attack statistics (range/damage) should update.
TEST_3.strategy: Record current weapon type. Simulate 'Z' key press. Check player's weapon property.
TEST_3.expected: Player active weapon should change from 'sword' to 'hammer' (or vice versa) and attack statistics (range/damage) should update.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify Soul Stone collection and win condition.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Teleport player directly to the position of the final Soul Stone. Wait one frame for collision detection.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: GameState should transition to "GAME_OVER_WIN" and score should reflect the collected objective bonus.
TEST_4.description: Verify Soul Stone collection and win condition.
